_description: TB report column type keys observed in the wire body workbench-api /v1/trialbalancereport/createReports under reportFormat.columns[].type. Each captured column object has shape {id, type, name, abbrev, variance, order, periodId, periodEndDate, isDeleted}; columns with type='Remarks' additionally include an `engagementId` field.
_known_unmapped: Tax (TJE) — likely exists; not yet captured
Prior-period adjustment (PAJE) — likely exists; not yet captured
Variance variants — column structure has a `variance` field that is null in every captured column; variance-type columns are presumed to populate it

Adjusted.name: Adjusted Balance
Adjusted._note: Observed in UI as a removable column; not captured on the wire yet.

Remarks.name: Remarks {N}
Remarks._note: Remarks columns carry an extra `engagementId` field in the column object (other types don't). Multiple Remarks columns are indexed 1, 2, 3, ...

_prior_period_column._note: Comparative/PY column — periodId = PY engagement id, PY periodEndDate. Only present when a comparative TB is imported.
